name: peercast
description: PeerCast — 1v1 Crypto PeerCast Telegram Bot with Chainlink Integration

scripts.contracts:deploy:base-sepolia: cd contracts && source .env && forge script script/DeployBetFactory.s.sol --rpc-url $BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL --verify --broadcast --chain-id 84532
scripts.cre:install: cd cre-workflows/bet-creation && bun install && bun x cre-setup && cd ../bet-settlement && bun install && bun x cre-setup
scripts.cre:simulate:bet-creation: cd cre-workflows && cre workflow simulate bet-creation --target staging-settings
scripts.cre:simulate:bet-settlement: cd cre-workflows && cre workflow simulate bet-settlement --target staging-settings
scripts.cre:deploy:bet-creation: cd cre-workflows && cre workflow deploy bet-creation --target staging-settings
scripts.cre:deploy:bet-settlement: cd cre-workflows && cre workflow deploy bet-settlement --target staging-settings
scripts.bot:install: cd bot && npm install && npx prisma generate
scripts.bot:dev: cd bot && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.bot:db:push: cd bot && npx prisma db push
scripts.bot:db:migrate: cd bot && npx prisma migrate dev
